ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the region */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_years" (
  "schl_year" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school year */,
  "schl_year_desc" TEXT /* Description of the school year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the school year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the school year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school year is the current one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schl_year")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_group" TEXT /* General category group of the expenditure data */,
  "category" TEXT /* Specific category within the expenditure data */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_group", "category")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the educational region */,
  "schl_year" INTEGER /* Reference to the school year */,
  "category_group" TEXT /* General category group of the expenditure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Specific category of the expenditure */,
  "exp_usd_amt" INTEGER /* Amount of expenditure in USD */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Direct reference to the funding source */,
  "budgeted_amount" INTEGER /* Budgeted amount for the expenditure */,
  "actual_amount" INTEGER /* Actual amount spent */,
  "variance" INTEGER /* Variance between budgeted and actual amounts */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_funding_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_schl_year FOREIGN KEY ("schl_year") REFERENCES school_years ("schl_year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the funding source is currently active */,
  "budget_limit" INTEGER /* Budget limit for the funding source */,
  "available_balance" INTEGER /* Available balance in the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_funding" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expenditure record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding source */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was allocated */,
  "allocation_amount" INTEGER /* Amount allocated from the funding source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id", "fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, finance officer, policymaker) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
